chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 55 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.526/2016. 24.03.2026 Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 30.09.2016, following order was passed: “30.09.2016 Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Advocate. 1- To be complied with before the next date. 2- Exempted subject to all just exceptions. 3 to 4- Counsel for the applicant request for time and reformulate the question. Time is granted, however, subject to all just exception.” On 18.09.202, following order was passed: “18.09.2020 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel for the petitioner requests for further time to reformulate the questions and to prepare the case. As an indulgence and last chance, two week’s time is granted to do the needful, however, subject to all just exceptions. Adjourned for a date to be fixed by the office.” Today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
